message:
fix(frame): add Bool variant to debug column name parser and use type-inferred Column construction

- Add Bool(...) pattern to clean_col_name extractor so boolean pivot
  keys are properly unwrapped in DataFrame debug formatting
- Switch aggregate column construction from Column::new(DType::Float64, ...)
  to Column::from_values(...) to let the type be inferred from actual
  values, avoiding forced Float64 coercion on non-float aggregates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
